projects.title: Optimal Transport Theory-based GAN
projects.description: Built a GAN based on Optimal Transport theory to generate unreal datasets for improving classification model performance. Implemented in TensorFlow.

projects.title: BRACU DUBURI - Autonomous Underwater Vehicle
projects.description: Bangladesh's first AUV. Developed transfer-learning-based object detection for the rover. Uses Jetson Nano as processing unit.

projects.title: Real-time Sleep Detection and Warning System
projects.description: Driver sleep detection system that alerts drivers when sleepy. Built with OpenCV.

projects.title: Sine-wave Predictor
projects.description: Time series prediction using Python, NumPy, Matplotlib, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn. Sequential model with Dense and SimpleRNN layers.

inProgress.title: Optimal Transport Theory based GAN for Medical Image Augmentation and Classification
